channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Struggling to find a decent iPad deal? I'd recommend the iPad Air M3 while it's still $250 off
item.description: Struggling to find a decent iPad deal? Here's why I'd recommend this slightly older iPad Air while it's still on sale.

item.title: Android : Google va intégrer une appli pour signer facilement vos documents
item.description: Google est en train de déployer une nouvelle application Signatures que vous pourrez utiliser pour créer votre signature manuscrite numérique pour signer des documents depuis votre smartphone Android.

item.title: Android just made a big change to your backups — and there's good news and bad news
item.description: Your Android backups are going to start using more of your Google account storage, but at least you'll also have more control over what gets backed up.

item.title: L’Oppo Reno 16 FS plus orienté autonomie et photo que le Reno 16 classique est soldé à -200 €
item.description: L'Oppo Reno 16 FS 8+512 Go est un smartphone milieu de gamme premium avec une batterie généreuse et un bloc photo plus performant, à retrouver pour 599 euros au lieu de 799 euros pendant les Soldes sur Boulanger.

item.title: The Best iPhone 17 Cases (2026): Our Picks After Testing 100+
item.description: Protect your expensive iPhone 17, iPhone Air, iPhone Pro, or iPhone 17e with our favorite cases and screen protectors.

item.title: How to watch Djokovic vs Auger-Aliassime for FREE: live stream Wimbledon 2026 quarter-final from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Novak Djokovic vs Felix Auger-Aliassime online and from anywhere as the two battle for a place in the Wimbledon semi-finals.

item.title: Geekom GeekBook M16 business laptop review
item.description: The Geekom GeekBook M16 is a large laptop that leverages an older 100-series Core Ultra processor and LPDDR5X memory.

item.title: SFR dévoile sa Box 5G Wi-Fi 7 avec décodeur TV et baisse radicalement ses prix
item.description: SFR bouscule le marché de la 5G fixe en lançant une nouvelle Box compatible Wi-Fi 7 accompagnée d'un décodeur TV. Une offre « triple play » complète, sans engagement et à prix en baisse pour concurrencer la fibre.

item.title: Bosch star Titus Welliver teases plans for 'standalone movie' after MGM+ prequel series Bosch: Start of War and Ballard season 2 — 'You've not seen the end of Harry Bosch'
item.description: You heard it here first: plans for a Bosch 'standalone movie' are currently in the works, according to lead actor Titus Welliver.

item.title: « Je me suis dit que ça pouvait être des extraterrestres » : l’Australie enquête sur de mystérieuses sphères sur ses plages
item.description: Six sphères métalliques ont été retrouvées depuis vendredi sur une plage isolée du Queensland en Australie. L'Agence spatiale australienne (ASA) planche sur la provenance de ces étranges objets. De quoi interroger le voisinage qui aime à imaginer qu'elles ne proviennent pas de la Terre. La...

item.title: This new interactive tool on the reMarkable Paper Pro turns your device into Tom Riddle’s diary from Harry Potter — and it’s one of the smartest e-reader features I’ve seen
item.description: A developer has designed an ereader tool that mimics Tom Riddle's diary from the Harry Potter series.

item.title: How to watch Pegula vs. Gauff online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Pegula vs. Gauff in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Baby Boomers beat Gen Z in password hygiene, but both generations still don’t stick to the best practices — and many people are still using decades-old passwords that they made as kids
item.description: Baby Boomers are the most likely to frequently change passwords, but often rely on unsecure methods of storage.

item.title: Pratique, iOS 27 permet de suivre les colis Amazon France : voici comment ca marche
item.description: L'une des nouveautés d'iOS 27, c'est le suivi de colis simplifié directement dans l'application Cartes. Désormais, l'application peut suivre les colis Amazon.

item.title: How to watch Osaka vs. Muchová online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Osaka vs. Muchová in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Hisense UR9 RGB MiniLED: An Affordable TV in Its Class
item.description: The brand’s UR9 competes with similar offerings from higher-end brands like Samsung and LG.

item.title: Are you ready for what it takes to stop ghost guns?
item.description: In the summer of 2024, former Army National Guard member Andrew Scott Hastings spent a sweaty afternoon carefully packing boxes with parts he made using his 3D printer. These weren't novelty figurines or replacement Ikea pieces. The boxes were instead filled with a handful of homemade firearm lower receivers and more than 100 "switches," small […]

item.title: iPhone Air 2 : une fuite confirme une grosse batterie et deux capteurs photo pour corriger le tir
item.description: Une nouvelle source confirme que l'iPhone Air 2 s'attaquerait bien aux deux gros reproches faits à son prédécesseur : un seul capteur photo et une batterie minuscule.

item.title: Are enterprises hiring the wrong Chief AI Officer?
item.description: Chief AI Officers should focus on transformation outcomes rather than technology alone.

item.title: Ce ransomware IA peut mener une cyberattaque sans l’aide d’un être humain… enfin presque
item.description: La première cyberattaque par ransomware entièrement pilotée par un agent d'intelligence artificielle vient d'être découverte. L'offensive se distingue par un niveau élevé d'automatisation, mais elle a nécessité le travail d'un pirate de chair et de sang, du moins à ses débuts.

item.title: Dutton Ranch season 2 won't be released on Paramount+ any time soon — but this 'wild' fan prediction is so good that Taylor Sheridan should take some notes
item.description: We've had no word yet on when Dutton Ranch season 2 might be released or enter production — but one fan has an interesting theory about the next installment.

item.title: The AI Scaling gap: why ambition is outpacing readiness
item.description: Transitioning from AI experimentation to integrated operational value is a complex journey for many IT leaders.

item.title: Horrific Nightborn trailer looks like one for new parents to avoid
item.description: Shudder has dropped its trailer for "Nightborn", a maternal Finnish horror from Hanna Bergholm, starring Rupert Grint and Seidi Haarla.

item.title: Your voice can be cloned in minutes using AI, and Taylor Swift is trying to protect hers — but what rights do the rest of us have?
item.description: As Taylor Swift fights for ownership of her voice, I asked legal experts what rights the rest of us have.

item.title: Rachat de Renault : comment la France a fait capoter l’offensive du géant chinois BYD
item.description: Selon une information des « Echos », BYD aurait tenté deux fois d’entrer au capital de Renault ces dernières années. Le constructeur au losange aurait dit non à chaque fois.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Play Booster Box hits lowest-ever price on Amazon — save over $80
item.description: Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Play Booster Box is down to $124.98 at Amazon, marking its lowest price yet.

item.title: Best Indoor Garden Systems: I've Been Testing All Year (2026)
item.description: Grow a backyard’s worth of greens and vegetables in your house with a vertical hydroponic garden. Here are a few that might be worth the investment.

item.title: Nothing’s first B-series phone is also skipping the US
item.description: Nothing is shaking up the branding of its cheapest phones, following up last year's Phone 3A Lite with a new Phone 4B. Combining design elements of the 4A and 4A Pro, it follows Nothing's previous cheaper handsets in skipping the US market. The company already uses the "A" branding to market its cheaper tier of […]

item.title: The Polaroid Now+ 3rd Gen I-Type instant film camera is on sale at Amazon — save over $20
item.description: As of July 7, the black Polaroid Now+ 3rd Gen I-Type instant film camera has dropped to $126.63 at Amazon. That's 16% off its list price of $149.99.

item.title: Nothing’s new earbuds can record calls and what you’re listening to
item.description: Nothing announced a new pair of budget-friendly wireless earbuds, but not as part of the company's affordability-focused sub-brand, CMF. The new Nothing Ear 3A are available starting today through the company's online store for $99, which is the same price as Nothing's original Ear (a). That's good news in a time when price increases are […]

item.title: 'You could've given me 10 guesses, I wouldn't have gone for this': my favorite cheap Nothing earbuds finally have a successor, but the USP isn't my idea of 'joyful'
item.description: Nothing's new Ear (3a) don't just deal in the odd use of parentheses and new colorways; there's also on-ear chat recording and a host of new features

item.title: Nothing announces Ear (3a) sub-$100 ANC earbuds
item.description: Nothing's Ear (3a) are ANC-equipped earbuds that cost less than $100.

item.title: Soldes : l’Acer Predator Helios 16 AI avec RTX 5090 perd 720 euros chez E.Leclerc
item.description: L'Acer Predator Helios 16 AI est un PC portable, pardon, une machine de guerre suréquipée que vous retrouvez à 3 879 euros au lieu de 4 599 euros sur E.Leclerc.

item.title: Proton VPN adds 89 new servers in Brazil after CazeTV World Cup streams flood its network
item.description: Proton VPN has deployed 89 new servers in Brazil after a massive influx of international users flocking to free 4K World Cup broadcasts on YouTube's CazeTV caused intense network strain.

item.title: Argentine-Égypte : comment voir le 8e de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026 en streaming ?
item.description: Les 8es de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026 se poursuivent ce mardi 7 juillet avec une affiche de taille : l'Argentine face à l'Égypte. Voici à quelle heure, sur quelle chaîne et comment regarder le match en direct, gratuitement ou via un abonnement.

item.title: Résultats du Bac 2026 : à quelle heure tombent les résultats et comment consulter ses notes ?
item.description: C'est le grand jour pour les près de 730 000 candidats du baccalauréat général, technologique et professionnel, les résultats tombent aujourd'hui ! Voici à quelle heure tombent les résultats du bac 2026 académie par académie et comment consulter ses notes.

item.title: Keep your files protected on the go: My favorite Samsung SSDs are on sale at Amazon right now
item.description: I rely on fast portable storage every day, and these are the two Samsung SSDs I recommend the most.

item.title: Shadow AI is a business design problem, but it can be overcome
item.description: Shadow AI is everywhere, but banning it will only make matters worse.

item.title: A new Switch 2 with a replaceable battery will be available soon, as Nintendo announces that it will 'no longer sell' original Switch consoles in Europe
item.description: Nintendo will stop selling original Switch consoles from early 2027 in Europe, as it announces a new Switch 2 featuring a replaceable battery.

item.title: SFR lance une box 5G Wi-Fi 7 avec des débits en hausse et un tarif plus accessible
item.description: Un mois après l'officialisation d'un accord sur la vente de SFR, l'opérateur au carré rouge continue d'étoffer son catalogue commercial avec aujourd'hui le lancement d'une nouvelle box 5G, compatible Wi-Fi 7.

item.title: Comment installer une climatisation en copropriété ? Ce que dit la loi avant de fixer votre unité extérieure
item.description: Poser une clim en copropriété, c'est rarement une affaire entre soi et son mur. Dès qu'une unité extérieure touche la façade, il faut le feu vert de l'assemblée générale, sous peine de tout redémonter à ses frais.

item.title: FIFA World Cup schedule today: Games, kickoff times, livestream info for July 7
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the FIFA World Cup on July 7, including the day's schedule, kickoff times, and livestream information.

item.title: Pete Holmes Is Not Reading Your Email
item.description: “You can make a living, you can have a life, and leave 55,000 emails unread with a big fuck off.”

item.title: People Used to Control Machines. They Don’t Anymore
item.description: In a world regulated by devices, humanity has become disconnected from the physical world—from stick-shift cars to postcards.

item.title: Erling Haaland Is Everywhere at the World Cup. Most of It Is AI
item.description: Norwegian striker Erling Haaland isn’t just a footballer anymore. He’s become an internet character perpetuated by fans and AI.

item.title: How to watch Sinner vs Struff for FREE: live stream Wimbledon 2026 quarter-final online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Jannik Sinner vs Jan-Lennard Struff online and from anywhere as the two battle for a place in the Wimbledon semi-finals.

item.title: Supergirl's digital release date has seemingly been revealed — and the new comic book movie could be available to rent or buy just one month after bombing at the box office
item.description: As Supergirl's box office woes continue, DC Studios appears to be lining up an earlier than expected home release for its latest movie.

item.title: Why today’s smartest shoppers are at Walmart, Costco, Ulta, and Ross
item.description: We’re in a trade-down economy. These four lessons are helping retailers win both affluent and lower-income consumers as the rules of shopping radically change. There used to be a clear divide between the people who shopped at Walmart and those who shopped at Saks. Not anymore.

item.title: States with the most—and least—housing market inventory heading into the core summer season
item.description: National active housing market inventory growth is at a crawl—but not in Washington. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Baltimore figured out the secret to a better public swimming pool
item.description: Thanks to accessibility-focused renovations, these neighborhood anchors better serve the intergenerational communities around them. In mid June, Baltimore celebrated the opening of a newly renovated public pool. Located in Poppleton, a neighborhood in West Baltimore, the Greater Model Aquatics Center features a zero-entry wading pool (it gently slopes from the deck into the water, like a natural shoreline), a six-lane lap pool, and an expansive deck furnished with bright yellow lounge chairs, shade umbrellas, and a splash pad. A new rec building with public restrooms is also part of the comple...

item.title: This startup spent 2 years redesigning the toothpaste tube into a toothpaste pump
item.description: Suri made its name by building a better-designed, more sustainable electric toothbrush. Now it wants to do the same for refillable toothpaste. The toothpaste tube is the type of badly designed everyday object that tends to go unnoticed: It’s messy, the crumpled tubes look bad on a countertop, and tens of billions of the single-use plastic packages end up in landfills each year. But it’s been made in essentially the same way for decades....

item.title: Vous pouvez jouer à Mario Kart sur YouTube, mais le résultat divise les internautes
item.description: Jouer à Mario Kart et Five Nights at Freddy's sur YouTube, c’est possible grâce la fonctionnalité vidéo sphérique à 360 degrés de la plateforme. Cependant, n’espérez pas une expérience de jeu développée, il est davantage question de vidéos interactives.

item.title: British Space Startup Launches Longevity Lab Into Orbit
item.description: The lab will beam back data to train AI models to predict how proteins behind age-related diseases like Alzheimer’s and certain cancers behave.

item.title: Panneaux solaires : climatiseur, chauffe-eau, voiture électrique ou batterie, quel est le moyen le plus rentable d’écouler son surplus ?
item.description: Depuis juin 2026, EDF ne rachète plus votre surplus solaire que 1,1 centime le kilowattheure. La question n'est plus de le revendre, mais de savoir quoi en faire, et là, la batterie n'est pas toujours la bonne réponse.
